name: Citizen NFTs
headline: Mint the founding Citizens of Alpha City
tagline: A hidden, collection-driven mint page that can be repointed to future drops without rewriting the launchpad UI.
description: This initial collection demonstrates the launchpad infrastructure: one manifest, one uploaded CSV, and a matching image bundle. Swap in a new collection folder and update the registry when the next mint is ready.
mintNote: Traits and preview art are loaded directly from the active collection folder. This seed bundle includes 6 local Citizens while the target launch supply remains 1,690.

contract.message: Mint contract wiring is still pending. When the Sui mint flow is ready, update this collection manifest and the launchpad script will use the new settings.

phases.name: Allowlist
phases.description: Guaranteed access for the earliest Citizens supporters and curated wallets.

phases.name: Priority
phases.description: A first-come phase for any remaining Citizens after the allowlist window closes.

phases.name: Public
phases.description: Any unminted Citizens open to the public once the private windows complete.

details.label: Seed bundle
details.value: 6 local Citizen previews included in-repo; swap in the full drop assets before launch

details.label: Collection switch
details.value: Change /launchpad/collections/index.json to point at a different manifest
